calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-14-2023 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Angela Bauman appearing for Bauman Landscape and Construction / Defendant;
Thomas Hodgin / Plaintiff in Pro Per.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. All parties are sworn.

Angela Bauman testifies behalf of the appellant/defendant. John Wood also testifies on behalf of the appellant/defendant.

Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on his own behalf. Samantha James also testifies on behalf of the respondent/plaintiff. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1 - Packet of Documents Including Photographs of Car Damage and Repair Estimates.

At the conclusion of the hearing, The Court orders matter submitted and takes matter under submission. Exhibits are retained. Judge: Honorable Sharon Reardon; Clerk: Kevin Rayala; Not Reported: (D624).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2023 Set For Trial On Nov-02-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 624

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Continued To Nov-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Judgment Entered
